mapper.select: SELECT PRODUCTID AS productId, CATEGORY AS categoryId, NAME AS name, DESC AS description FROM PRODUCT WHERE CATEGORY = #{categoryId}
SELECT PRODUCTID AS productId, CATEGORY AS categoryId, NAME AS name, DESC AS description FROM PRODUCT WHERE NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT PRODUCTID AS productId, CATEGORY AS categoryId, NAME AS name, DESC AS description FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCTID = #{productId}
